function mU(e, t) {

function DU(e) {

        o = 0),

        x) : (p(gt.EXPECTED_TOKEN, i(), 0, x),

    }

        return C.skipToPeek(),
        x
    }

    }

            return !1;

    }
    function H(C, x) {

    }

    }

    function Le(C) {

        }

    }
    function Ue(C) {

    function se(C, x) {

            type: 13
        };

    function Z() {

class p4 {
    constructor(t) {
        this._name = t,
        this._store = c4.namespace(t)
    }
    addLog(t, n, r, o) {
        this._store.set(cf.uuid(), this.composeFullLog(t, n, r, o))
    }
    getLogs(t) {
        const n = new Map;
        return this._store.keys().slice(0, t).forEach(r => n.set(r, this._store.get(r))),
        n
    }
    removeLogs(t) {
        t.forEach(n => this._store.remove(n))
    }
    getSize() {
        return this._store.size()
    }
    removeExpiredLogs() {
        this._store.keys().forEach(t => {
            this._store.get(t).time < bs().subtract(1, "day").format("x") && this._store.remove(t)
        }
        )
    }
    composeFullLog(t, n, r, o) {
        return {
            id: cf.uuid(),
            namespace: this._name,
            level: t,
            descriptor: n,
            env: r,
            time: bs().format("x"),
            data: o
        }
    }
}

const Jg = Xl("logger", {
    state: () => ({
        logStorage: null,
        loggerConfig: {
            tick: 1500,
            tickSize: 14,
            flushSize: 14,
            debounceTime: 1e4
        },
        isFlushLogsPeriodicallyCalled: !1,
        debouncedFlushLogsPeriodically: null
    }),
    getters: {
        getLogStorage: e => e.logStorage,
        isLogStorageAvailable(e) {
            return e.logStorage !== null
        },
        realtimeCollect(e) {
            return e.loggerConfig.realtimeCollect || []
        },
        getLoggerConfig: e => e.loggerConfig
    },
    actions: {
        async initLogStorage() {
            if (this.isLogStorageAvailable)
                return;
            await this.downloadAndStoreLoggerConfig();
            const e = new p4("JGAMING_FNLOG");
            return this.logStorage = e,
            e.removeExpiredLogs(),
            e
        },
        async downloadAndStoreLoggerConfig() {
            const e = Ts();
            try {
                const n = (await $fetch((e.public.envLocation || "") + "env/loggerConfig.json", {
                    responseType: "text"
                })).substring(1)
                  , r = atob(n)
                  , o = JSON.parse(r);
                this.loggerConfig = {
                    ...this.loggerConfig,
                    ...o
                },
                this.debouncedFlushLogsPeriodically = E6(async () => {
                    await this.flushLogsPeriodically()
                }
                , this.loggerConfig.debounceTime)
            } catch (t) {
                console.error("downloadAndStoreLoggerConfig", t.message)
            }
        },
        async flushLogs() {
            const t = Zr().getEnv
              , n = this.loggerConfig
              , r = this.logStorage.getLogs(n.tickSize);
            if (r.size !== 0)
                try {
                    return await $fetch(n.logger[t.lineInfoFileName] + "/batchLog", {
                        method: "POST",
                        body: Array.from(r.values()),
                        headers: {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json"
                        }
                    }),
                    this.logStorage.removeLogs(Array.from(r.keys())),
                    r
                } catch (o) {
                    throw console.error("flushLogs error", o),
                    o
                }
        },
        async flushLogsPeriodically() {
            const e = Zr()
              , t = this.loggerConfig;
            if (!this.realtimeCollect.includes(e.getEnv.lineInfoFileName)) {
                console.error("".concat(e.getEnv.lineInfoFileName, " is not in realtimeCollect"));
                return
            }
            if (this.isLogStorageAvailable && !this.isFlushLogsPeriodicallyCalled) {
                for (this.isFlushLogsPeriodicallyCalled = !0; this.logStorage.getSize() > 0; )
                    await g4(t == null ? void 0 : t.tick),
                    await this.flushLogs();
                this.isFlushLogsPeriodicallyCalled = !1
            }
        },
        extendMessage(e) {
            const t = Zr();
            let n;
            try {
                n = typeof e == "string" ? JSON.parse(e) : e
            } catch (o) {
                console.error("extendMessage JSON.parse error", o.message),
                n = {}
            }
            const {getQueryParam: r} = Oo();
            return {
                ...n,
                accessToken: t.getToken,
                apiServer: t.getApiServer,
                gName: r("gName"),
                gameType: r("gameType"),
                mType: r("mType"),
                ui_version: t.getVersion,
                uniqueKey: t.getUnique,
                userAgent: typeof window < "u" ? window.navigator.userAgent : "",
                userName: t.getUserName,
                uiversion: t.getVersion
            }
        },
        async setLog(e) {
            try {
                const t = Zr()
                  , n = t.getEnv;
                this.isLogStorageAvailable || await this.initLogStorage();
                const r = await this.extendMessage(e)
                  , o = e.level.toLowerCase();
                e.level !== "GAME" && this.logStorage.addLog(o, e.event, n.lineInfoFileName, JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(r))),
                ["GAME", "TOTAL", "MEMBER_SYS_UI"].includes(e.level) && await this.sendToKibana(r),
                (this.logStorage.getSize() >= this.loggerConfig.flushSize || t.getGlobalError !== null) && await this.flushLogsPeriodically()
            } catch (t) {
                console.error("setLog", t.message)
            }
        },
        async sendToKibana(e) {
            const t = Zr();
            delete e.uiversion;
            const n = {
                action: 13,
                data: JSON.stringify(Object.assign(e, {
                    ui_version: t.getVersion,
                    uniqueKey: "".concat(t.getUnique, " ").concat(t.getUserName)
                }))
            };
            return await t.connect({
                data: jg.stringify(n, {
                    encodeValuesOnly: !0
                })
            }).catch(r => {
                console.error("sendToKibana", r.message)
            }
            )
        }
    }
})

            return this.isGeneralError ? [103, 205, 7002, "7502"].includes(this.code) : !1
        },
        isMaintained() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? ["9013", "9022"].includes(this.code) : !1
        },
        tokenRejected() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? this.code === "9005" : !1
        },
        reConnecting() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? this.code === 301 : !1
        },
        confirmOnlyAndCloseGame() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? [7117].includes(this.code) : !1
        },
        confirmOnly() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? [2, 208, 7109, 9028].includes(this.code) : !1
        },
        isBetSelectionError() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? this.code === 8014 : !1
        },
        isFishInsufficientBalance() {
            return this.isGeneralError ? this.code === 7116 : !1
        }
    },
    methods: {
        redirectTo(r) {
            H.emit("proxyRedirect", {
                url: r
            })
        },
        disableError() {
            this.appStore.setGlobalError(null)
        },
        tryGoHome() {
            this.hasHome ? this.redirectTo(this.getHome) : this.$router.replace("/close")
        },
        kick() {
            if (this.getQueryParam("homeUrl") === "home")
                this.isApiAccount || !this.hasQueryParam("in") ? this.$router.replace("/close") : this.redirectTo("".concat(window.location.protocol, "//").concat(this.getEnv.home, "/login/?reset=").concat(k.generate()));
            else if (this.getQueryParam("homeUrl") !== void 0) {
                const r = this.getQueryParam("homeUrl");
                this.redirectTo("".concat(r + (r.includes("?") ? "&" : "?"), "reset=").concat(k.generate()))
            } else
                this.$router.replace("/close")
        },
        reloadPage() {
            window.location.reload()
        }
    }
}

    __name: "ErrorModal"
})
  , ye = {
    components: {
        errorModal: E
    },
    setup() {
        const r = T()
          , o = v()
          , d = q()
          , l = c( () => o.getVersion)
          , m = c( () => o.getUserStatus)
          , e = c( () => o.getGlobalError)
          , h = c( () => o.getSceneEvents)
          , u = c( () => d.debouncedFlushLogsPeriodically)
          , s = c( () => e.value !== null)
          , G = r.public.dlServerVersion;
        let f = null;
        return D( () => {
            f = d.$onAction( ({name: b, after: C}) => {
                b === "setLog" && C( () => {
                    u.value && u.value()
                }
                )
            }
            )
        }
        ),
        O( () => {
            f && f()
        }
        ),
        Q(m, b => {
            b === "user-restrict" ? o.setGlobalError({
                code: 7502,
                message: {}
            }) : b === "user-banned" && o.setGlobalError({
                code: 7503,
                message: {}
            })
        }
        ),
        {
            getVersion: l,
            getUserStatus: m,
            globalError: e,
            getSceneEvents: h,
            debouncedFlushLogsPeriodically: u,
            isError: s,
            dlServerVersion: G
        }
    },
    methods: {
        formatScreenSymbols(r) {
            if (Array.isArray(r))
                return r.join(",")
        }
    }
}

function Vf() {

    }

const g = {

    props: {

        },

        },

        }
    },
    setup(i, {emit: t}) {

          , {getQueryParam: a} = y();

            emit: t,

    },
    data() {

            },

        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.emit("ready", this.$refs.jdbGameFrame.contentWindow),
        this.frameWindow = this.$refs.jdbGameFrame.contentWindow,
        (window.layoutFrameMode === "ForceMobileLandscape" || window.layoutFrameMode === "ForceMobilePortrait") && (this.inferRatioInfo(window.layoutAspectRatio),

    },

    },
    methods: {
        measureViewport() {

              , t = "inner";
            return "innerWidth"in window || (t = "client",
            i = document.documentElement || document.body),
            {
                width: i[t + "Width"],
                height: i[t + "Height"]
            }
        },
        listenToViewportUpdate() {

                passive: !0
            }),

                passive: !0
            })
        },

            }

        },

              , e = i / t;

            this.frameStyles.height = "100%")
        },
        forceFitScene() {

              , e = t / i;

            this.frameStyles.height = Math.round(i * this.ratioInfo.heightBased) + "px") : (this.frameStyles.width = "100%",

        },

                upperBound: e + this.boundStep,

function parse(t, e) {
    var s, n, i;
    if (!NUMERIC.test(e))
        throw Error(INVALID + "number");
    for (t.s = e.charAt(0) == "-" ? (e = e.slice(1),
    -1) : 1,
    (s = e.indexOf(".")) > -1 && (e = e.replace(".", "")),
    (n = e.search(/e/i)) > 0 ? (s < 0 && (s = n),
    s += +e.slice(n + 1),
    e = e.substring(0, n)) : s < 0 && (s = e.length),
    i = e.length,
    n = 0; n < i && e.charAt(n) == "0"; )
        ++n;
    if (n == i)
        t.c = [t.e = 0];
    else {
        for (; i > 0 && e.charAt(--i) == "0"; )
            ;
        for (t.e = s - n - 1,
        t.c = [],
        s = 0; n <= i; )

function round(t, e, s, n) {
    var i = t.c;
    if (s === UNDEFINED && (s = t.constructor.RM),
    s !== 0 && s !== 1 && s !== 2 && s !== 3)
        throw Error(INVALID_RM);
    if (e < 1)
        n = s === 3 && (n || !!i[0]) || e === 0 && (s === 1 && i[0] >= 5 || s === 2 && (i[0] > 5 || i[0] === 5 && (n || i[1] !== UNDEFINED))),
        i.length = 1,
        n ? (t.e = t.e - e + 1,
        i[0] = 1) : i[0] = t.e = 0;
    else if (e < i.length) {
        if (n = s === 1 && i[e] >= 5 || s === 2 && (i[e] > 5 || i[e] === 5 && (n || i[e + 1] !== UNDEFINED || i[e - 1] & 1)) || s === 3 && (n || !!i[0]),
        i.length = e,
        n) {
            for (; ++i[--e] > 9; )
                if (i[e] = 0,
                e === 0) {
                    ++t.e,
                    i.unshift(1);
                    break
                }
        }
        for (e = i.length; !i[--e]; )
            i.pop()
    }
    return t
}
function stringify(t, e, s) {
    var n = t.e
      , i = t.c.join("")
      , r = i.length;
    if (e)
        i = i.charAt(0) + (r > 1 ? "." + i.slice(1) : "") + (n < 0 ? "e" : "e+") + n;
    else if (n < 0) {
        for (; ++n; )
            i = "0" + i;
        i = "0." + i
    } else if (n > 0)
        if (++n > r)
            for (n -= r; n--; )
                i += "0";
        else
            n < r && (i = i.slice(0, n) + "." + i.slice(n));
    else
        r > 1 && (i = i.charAt(0) + "." + i.slice(1));
    return t.s < 0 && s ? "-" + i : i
}

    _ != h)

P.div = function(t) {

        return t.s = r,
        t.c = [t.e = 0],
        t;
    var _, h, a, m, f, A = i.slice(), T = _ = i.length, R = n.length, S = n.slice(0, _), C = S.length, O = t, y = O.c = [], N = 0, M = d + (O.e = e.e - t.e) + 1;

    r = M < 0 ? 0 : M,

P.sqrt = function() {

    class: "UI-Inner"
}

    class: "info"
}

    class: "title"

  , _sfc_main$f = {
    __name: "HelpUI",
    props: {
        helpUiCdn: {
            type: String,
            default: ""
        },
        customSpinImage: {
            type: String,
            default: "CTRL_Spin"
        },
        hasExtraBet: {
            type: Boolean,
            default: !1
        },
        helpLocale: {
            type: String,
            required: !0
        }
    },
    setup(t) {
        const e = t
          , {t: s, locale: n} = useI18n({
            useScope: "local",
            fallbackLocale: "en",
            inheritLocale: !1
        });
        n.value = e.helpLocale;
        const i = computed( () => e.hasExtraBet ? "infoText_b_extraBet" : "infoText_b");
        return (r, d) => {
            const _ = resolveDirective("html-b64-image");
            return openBlock(),
            createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_1$f, [createBaseVNode("div", _hoisted_2$e, [createBaseVNode("header", _hoisted_3$c, toDisplayString(unref(s)("UI.title[0].title_a")), 1), withDirectives(createBaseVNode("div", null, null, 512), [[_, unref(s)("UI.info[0].infoText_a", {
                CTRL_Add: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Minus: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Exit: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_FastMode: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Spin: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Spin_Image: t.customSpinImage,
                CTRL_Stop: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Bet: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Balance: t.helpUiCdn
            })]])]), createBaseVNode("div", _hoisted_4$b, [createBaseVNode("header", _hoisted_5$9, toDisplayString(unref(s)("UI.title[0].title_b")), 1), withDirectives(createBaseVNode("div", null, null, 512), [[_, unref(s)("UI.info[0].".concat(unref(i)), {
                CTRL_Add: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Minus: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Win: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_FastMode: t.helpUiCdn,

                CTRL_Spin_Image: t.customSpinImage,
                CTRL_Stop: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Bet: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_FBuy: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_FPlay: t.helpUiCdn,
                CTRL_Balance: t.helpUiCdn,

                CTRL_Extrabet: t.helpUiCdn
            })]])]), createBaseVNode("div", _hoisted_6$7, [createBaseVNode("header", _hoisted_7$7, toDisplayString(unref(s)("UI.title[0].title_c")), 1), withDirectives(createBaseVNode("div", null, null, 512), [[_, unref(s)("UI.info[0].infoText_c", {
                CTRL_Menu: t.helpUiCdn,

                CTRL_Report: t.helpUiCdn
            })]])]), createBaseVNode("div", _hoisted_8$7, [createBaseVNode("header", _hoisted_9$6, toDisplayString(unref(s)("UI.title[0].title_d")), 1), withDirectives(createBaseVNode("div", null, null, 512), [[_, unref(s)("UI.info[0].infoText_d", {

function useGameVersion() {
    const {getQueryParam: t} = useQueryParam()
      , e = computed( () => {
        var n;
        return ((n = t("gName")) != null ? n : "").split("_")[1] === "rel"
    }
    )
      , s = computed( () => {
        var i;
        const n = ((i = t("gName")) != null ? i : "").split("_");
        return n[n.length - 1]
    }
    );
    return {
        isSingleVersionControl: e,
        gameVersion: s
    }
}

    setup() {

            wrapMessage: s => t.wrapMessage(s)
        }
    },
    data() {
        return {
            amount: "0"
        }
    },
    computed: {
        userBalance() {
            return this.divideByThousand(this.getConfig.availableBalance)
        },
        formatUserBalance() {
            return this.formatAmount(this.userBalance)
        }
    },
    methods: {
        tryAppendNumber(t) {
            if (!(parseInt(t, 10) === 0 && this.amount === "0")) {
                if (parseInt(t, 10) !== 0 && this.amount === "0") {
                    this.amount = "".concat(t);
                    return
                }
                this.amount.length >= 10 || (this.amount = "".concat(this.amount).concat(t))
            }
        },
        clearAmount() {
            this.amount = "0"
        },
        tryDeleteRightmostNumber() {
            this.amount = this.amount.length === 1 ? "0" : this.amount.slice(0, -1)
        },
        submit() {
            const t = Big(this.amount).times(1e3).toString();
            if (window.layoutModule === 10) {
                const e = this.wrapMessage({
                    action: "setTransferAmount",
                    response: t
                });
                bus.emit("postMessageToFrame", e)
            } else
                window.setTransferAmount(t);
            this.appStore.closeModal()
        },
        formatAmount(t) {
            return numeral(t).format("0,0.[000]")
        },
        divideByThousand(t) {
            return Big(t).div(Big(1e3)).toFixed(3, Big.roundDown)
        }
    }
}

Sha1.prototype.update = function(t) {

Sha1.prototype.hash = function() {

Sha1.prototype.hex = function() {
    this.finalize();
    const t = this.h0
      , e = this.h1
      , s = this.h2
      , n = this.h3
      , i = this.h4;
    return HEX_CHARS[t >> 28 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t >> 24 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t >> 20 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t >> 16 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t >> 12 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t >> 8 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t >> 4 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[t & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 28 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 24 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 20 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 16 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 12 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 8 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e >> 4 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[e & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 28 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 24 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 20 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 16 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 12 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 8 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s >> 4 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[s & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 28 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 24 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 20 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 16 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 12 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 8 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n >> 4 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[n & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 28 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 24 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 20 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 16 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 12 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 8 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i >> 4 & 15] + HEX_CHARS[i & 15]
}
;
Sha1.prototype.toString = Sha1.prototype.hex;
Sha1.prototype.digest = function() {
    this.finalize();
    const t = this.h0
      , e = this.h1
      , s = this.h2
      , n = this.h3
      , i = this.h4;
    return [t >> 24 & 255, t >> 16 & 255, t >> 8 & 255, t & 255, e >> 24 & 255, e >> 16 & 255, e >> 8 & 255, e & 255, s >> 24 & 255, s >> 16 & 255, s >> 8 & 255, s & 255, n >> 24 & 255, n >> 16 & 255, n >> 8 & 255, n & 255, i >> 24 & 255, i >> 16 & 255, i >> 8 & 255, i & 255]
}
;
Sha1.prototype.array = Sha1.prototype.digest;
Sha1.prototype.arrayBuffer = function() {
    this.finalize();
    const t = new ArrayBuffer(20)
      , e = new DataView(t);
    return e.setUint32(0, this.h0),
    e.setUint32(4, this.h1),
    e.setUint32(8, this.h2),
    e.setUint32(12, this.h3),
    e.setUint32(16, this.h4),
    t
}
;

                break;

                s = "Grade_G";
                break;

                s = "Grade_H";
                break
            }
            return {

                time: e
            }

        setOneTimeSession(t) {
            if (!t)

                sessionStorage.setItem(e, t)

                this.oneTimeSession = t

        handleJAggregatorToJGameMessage(t) {
            if (!t.data)
                return;
            let e = null;
            if (isObject(t.data))
                e = t.data;
            else if (isString(t.data)) {
                if (t.data === "" || t.data.includes("gsProxy"))
                    return;
                try {
                    e = JSON.parse(t.data)
                } catch (i) {
                    this.loggerStore.setLog({
                        level: "MEMBER_SYS_UI",
                        event: "PARSE_POST_MESSAGE_FROM_AGGREGATOR_PAGE_FAILED",
                        message: {
                            rawData: t.data
                        }
                    });
                    return
                }
            } else
                return;
            const {action: s, response: n={}} = e;
            if (s === "ots" && this.setOneTimeSession(n.ots),
            s === "gpd" && this.appStore.setGamePageDomain(n.gpd),
            s === "freeSpinRewardEvent" || s === "sendDrawerData" || s === "fullScreenChange")
                if (window.layoutModule === 10) {
                    const i = this.wrapMessage({
                        action: s,
                        response: n
                    });
                    bus.emit("postMessageToFrame", i)
                } else
                    window[s] && window[s](n)
        },

            return new Promise(e => {
                setTimeout( () => {
                    e()
                }
                , t)
            }
            )
        },

        loadGameDependencies() {

        includesFile(t) {

        getGamePageInfo() {
            const t = {

            })
        },
        afterGetGamePageInfo(t, e, s) {
            performance.mark("GET_GAME_PAGE_INFO_END"),
            this.measurePerformanceAndSetLog("03_GET_GAME_PAGE_INFO", "GET_GAME_PAGE_INFO_START", "GET_GAME_PAGE_INFO_END"),
            this.appStore.setConfig(t),
